Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Hardware hotplug events on Linux, the gory details 158 upvotes, 16 comments
  2. Show HN: Jido 2.0, Elixir Agent Framework 300 upvotes, 62 comments
  3. Stupidly Obscure Programming in a Troubled Time (2018) 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. A ternary plot of citrus geneology 147 upvotes, 27 comments
  5. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 503 upvotes, 150 comments
  6. Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise 993 upvotes, 357 comments
  7. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 68 upvotes, 17 comments
  8. A standard protocol to handle and discard low-effort, AI-Generated pull requests 223 upvotes, 75 comments
  9. Show HN: Swarm – Program a colony of 200 ants using a custom assembly language 113 upvotes, 34 comments
  10. How to install and start using LineageOS on your phone 82 upvotes, 24 comments
  11. CBP tapped into the online advertising ecosystem to track peoples’ movements 482 upvotes, 191 comments
  12. Screeching Sound of Peeling Tape 32 upvotes, 8 comments
  13. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 91 upvotes, 33 comments
  14. 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips 729 upvotes, 360 comments
  15. Good software knows when to stop 479 upvotes, 239 comments
  16. Remotely unlocking an encrypted hard disk 162 upvotes, 75 comments
  17. GPL upgrades via section 14 proxy delegation 70 upvotes, 29 comments
  18. Image manipulation with convolution using Julia 12 upvotes, 2 comments
  19. Show HN: PageAgent, A GUI agent that lives inside your web app 120 upvotes, 62 comments
  20. First MacBook Neo Benchmarks Are In 18 upvotes, 5 comments
  21. System76 on Age Verification Laws 528 upvotes, 343 comments
  22. Judge orders government to begin refunding more than $130B in tariffs 992 upvotes, 706 comments
  23. GPT-5.4 889 upvotes, 699 comments
  24. The Brand Age 387 upvotes, 304 comments
  25. Where things stand with the Department of War 512 upvotes, 548 comments
  26. AI and the Ship of Theseus 132 upvotes, 137 comments
  27. Elite Overproduction 44 upvotes, 38 comments
  28. Payphone Go 9 upvotes, 4 comments
  29. Labor market impacts of AI: A new measure and early evidence 239 upvotes, 365 comments
  30. Stardex (YC S21) is hiring customer success engineers 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 9:30pm, 6 March 2026. Source here.
